mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user( name, email, password, zip_code, address ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{zipCode}, #{address} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, password = #{password}, zip_code = #{zipCode}, address = #{address} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE is_admin = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
